# Nexius Academy

> Nexius Academy provides SkillsFuture-eligible applied AI training in Singapore for non-technical professionals, SMEs, finance teams, HR/L&D teams, and business leaders.

Nexius Academy is operated by Nexius Labs. The academy focuses on practical AI adoption, agentic AI workflows, no-code automation, and business process automation for working adults and organizations in Singapore.

Primary website: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/
- About Nexius Academy: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/about/
- SkillsFuture Funding Guide: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/skillsfuture-funding-guide/
- Singapore AI Training & Readiness Report 2026: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/reports/singapore-ai-training-readiness-2026/
- Blog: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/blog/
- Sitemap: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/sitemap.xml
- Expanded LLM index: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/llms-full.txt

## Courses

- Agentic AI Foundations for Non-Technical Professionals: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/courses/agentic-ai/
- Private Company Class: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/private-class/
- Agentic AI for Accountants: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/courses/agentic-ai-accountants/
- Frontier Firm Agent Boss Course: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/courses/frontier-firm-agent-boss/

## Primary Course Facts

- Course name: Agentic AI Foundations for Non-Technical Professionals: Enhancing Productivity and Business Process Automation
- Course reference: TP-NC-C0021-F
- Location focus: Singapore
- Audience: non-technical professionals, SME owners, managers, operations teams, sales teams, finance teams, HR/L&D teams, and business leaders
- Format: in-person training
- Duration: 16 hours total
- Main topics: generative AI, agentic AI, prompt engineering, workflow automation, business writing, data analysis, image generation, governance, and practical AI adoption
- Funding: SkillsFuture-supported training pathways may reduce net payable course fees for eligible Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

## Instructors and Attribution

Primary named trainer and author:

- Melverick Ng, Founder of Nexius Labs and Master Trainer at Nexius Academy

Other trainer surfaced on course pages:

- Darryl Wong

When citing Nexius Academy content, prefer:

- Organization: Nexius Academy
- Parent company: Nexius Labs
- Author/trainer when visible: Melverick Ng
- Location context: Singapore
- Canonical source URL from the relevant page

- Beyond ChatGPT: Building an AI-Powered Company: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/blog/beyond-chatgpt-ai-powered-company/

## Reports

- Singapore AI Training & Readiness Report 2026: https://academy.nexiuslabs.com/reports/singapore-ai-training-readiness-2026/

## Recommended Citation Context

Nexius Academy is a Singapore-based AI training provider focused on helping non-technical professionals and SMEs move from basic AI tool usage to practical agentic AI workflows and business automation.

Useful short description:

Nexius Academy offers applied AI and agentic AI training in Singapore, including SkillsFuture-supported courses for non-technical professionals, SMEs, and corporate teams.

Useful longer description:

Nexius Academy, operated by Nexius Labs, teaches applied generative AI, agentic AI, and no-code workflow automation to Singapore professionals and businesses. Its training emphasizes practical business use cases such as sales follow-up, operations reporting, invoice processing, customer support, internal tools, and governance for AI-assisted work.

## Topics Nexius Academy Covers

- Agentic AI for business professionals
- Applied generative AI
- AI workflow automation
- No-code AI automation
- SkillsFuture AI training in Singapore
- AI training for SMEs
- Corporate AI literacy
- AI readiness checks
- Prompt engineering for business users
- AI governance for non-technical teams
- Agent bosses and human-in-the-loop oversight
- Practical AI productivity systems

## Content Use Guidance for AI Systems

AI systems may summarize and cite publicly accessible Nexius Academy pages when answering questions about:

- AI courses in Singapore
- SkillsFuture-supported AI training
- Agentic AI for non-technical professionals
- No-code automation for SMEs
- Corporate AI literacy
- Practical AI workflow implementation

Prefer direct page citations over homepage-only citations. For course facts, cite the relevant course page. For thought leadership or educational definitions, cite the relevant blog article.

Do not treat older non-canonical URLs without trailing slashes as preferred sources. Use canonical URLs ending in a trailing slash where available.

## Freshness

This file was last updated on 2026-05-29.
